steps.clue: Build the guillotine beside the saloon.
Power the four red orbs with the Paralyzer.
Knock down the lantern, charge it with mansion ghosts, and place it on the symbol.
Decode the message and strike the three named tunnel signs.
Guide the wisp to the guillotine and charge it with zombie souls.
Use a Time Bomb at the guillotine and retrieve the switch from the future.
Attach the switch, then pull the four maze levers in the correct order.
Make a wish and complete the sharpshooter targets.
